_README:
SNOMED concept IDs that were observed in Synthea pilot output BUT deliberately not added to data/synthea/snomed_to_icd10cm.json. These are codes whose canonical ICD-10-CM target is OUT of ACCESS-Model scope (per ACCESSCKMDiagnosisVS + ACCESSeCKMDiagnosisVS). Tracked separately so re-running scripts/inventory_synthea_snomed.py against future / larger cohorts can distinguish 'new code we haven't curated yet' from 'code we already evaluated and decided to drop.' The diff feature in inventory_synthea_snomed.py reads BOTH files when computing the 'new codes need curation' list.

If a future curator wants to expand ACCESS scope (e.g., include I21 acute MI for cardiovascular research), they would: (1) update src/phantom_codes/data/access_valuesets/, (2) move the relevant entries from this file to snomed_to_icd10cm.json with appropriate ICD codes, (3) regenerate cohort.

80394007.reason: ACCESS eCKM only includes R73.03 (Prediabetes), not R73.9 (general hyperglycemia).

22298006.reason: ACCESS CKM lists I20 (angina) + I24 (acute IHD) + specific I25.x chronic codes — but NOT I21 (acute MI).

399211009.reason: I25.2 not explicitly in ACCESS CKM; CKM lists I25.10-I25.119 and I25.3-I25.6 but not I25.2.

399261000.snomed_display: History of coronary artery bypass grafting (situation)
399261000.reason: Z95 status codes are not in ACCESS scope by definition (ACCESS targets diagnoses, not history/status).

401303003.snomed_display: Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction (disorder)
401303003.reason: Same as 22298006 — I21 (acute MI) not in ACCESS CKM.

401314000.snomed_display: Acute non-ST segment elevation myocardial infarction (disorder)

274531002.snomed_display: Abnormal findings diagnostic imaging heart+coronary circulat (finding)
274531002.reason: R93 imaging findings are not diagnoses — out of ACCESS scope.

237602007.reason: ACCESS eCKM explicitly lists hypertension, dyslipidemia, prediabetes, obesity codes — NOT the metabolic-syndrome umbrella code. The component diagnoses appear separately in patient Conditions.

431855005.reason: ACCESS CKM specifically targets CKD stage 3 (N18.30/N18.31/N18.32). Stages 1, 2, 4, and 5 are out of scope.

431856006.reason: Same as 431855005 — ACCESS CKM is stage-3-only.

46177005.reason: Same as 431855005 — ACCESS CKM is stage-3-only.

161665007.reason: Z94 status codes are not in ACCESS scope by definition.

698306007.reason: Z76 status codes are not in ACCESS scope by definition.

204949001.reason: Q61 codes are congenital kidney malformations; ACCESS CKM scope is N18.30/N18.31/N18.32 (CKD stage 3) only. Surfaced by full-cohort inventory diff 2026-05-03.

213150003.reason: T86.1X (Complications of kidney transplant) is not in ACCESS scope. Same reasoning as 161665007 (transplant status codes excluded). Surfaced by full-cohort inventory diff 2026-05-03.

275408006.reason: N99 (postprocedural complications) not in ACCESS scope; ACCESS CKM is N18.30-32 (CKD stage 3) only. Surfaced by full-cohort inventory diff 2026-05-03.

40095003.reason: S37 (kidney trauma) not in ACCESS scope; ACCESS targets cardiometabolic disease, not traumatic injuries. Surfaced by full-cohort inventory diff 2026-05-03.
